chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 54 to 58 / 2013 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE / PRIORITY. 1) For orders on CMA No. 756/2021. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For hearing of CMA No. 504/2014. 23.05.2025. Mr. Pervaiz A. Memon, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ Once again, bailiff has given report that the Respondent is not available even on the fresh address. Time and again, directions have been given to the Applicant department to trace out a fresh address of the Respondent who is a Custom Agent and a Licensee of the Applicant department. On 03.03.2025, we had recorded this observation but despite this, the Respondent department has failed to provide appropriate address. Such conduct cannot be appreciated. The Applicant department ought to have been vigilant; therefore, we are left with no choice but to dismiss this Reference application for non prosecution. Ordered accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in connected files. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
